'''鈭歡-b-y-sh''' ('''kagabyeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:juke|juke]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-y-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:juke|juke]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-b-y-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kagabyeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabyeshoko|thigabyeshoko]] || [[word:jigabyeshoko|jigabyeshoko]] || [[word:shigabyeshoko|shigabyeshoko]] || [[word:kigabyeshoko|kigabyeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabyeshoko|thuthugabyeshoko]] || [[word:jujugabyeshoko|jujugabyeshoko]] || [[word:shushugabyeshoko|shushugabyeshoko]] || [[word:kukugabyeshoko|kukugabyeshoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
